description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: check_syntax, deploy, and test. Add a check_deploy_code job in the check_syntax stage that runs ansible-playbook -i hosts.ini deploy.yaml --check then ansible-playbook -i hosts.ini test.yaml --check, and restrict it to runners tagged desktop. Add a deploy_network_config job in the deploy stage that runs ansible-playbook -i hosts.ini deploy.yaml on desktop runners. Add a test_network_config job in the test stage that runs ansible-playbook -i hosts.ini test.yaml on desktop runners.
